name: polybot
description: polyBOT — mastercopy + directional strategy daemons running against Polymarket CLOB v2. The Rust `polymarket` binary handles reads (orderbook, market data, balance); this Node package handles live order placement via @polymarket/clob-client-v2 since the upstream Rust SDK (polymarket-client-sdk 0.4.x) is incompatible with Polymarket's current CLOB v2 schema.
